form.label: SPL Search
form.description: Power-user full-text search over the indexed documentation. (The Documentation tab has the friendly browser.)

search.query: index=splunk_docs | stats count by product_title | sort - count | fields product_title

index=splunk_docs $kw$ | eval product_title=if(isnull(product_title) OR product_title="","Other",product_title) | search product_title=$prod|s$ | eval version=if(isnull(version) OR version="","—",version) | table product_title title version content_type url | sort product_title title
